title: Import data from excel
excerpt: Hello, many greetings. one question : I want to import data from a .csv to monday. the information is not added in the correct way the subitem and groups. is there a way to diagram the excel so that monday takes the elem…

posts.author: isrraelRios (Isrrael Rios)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, many greetings. one question : I want to import data from a .csv to monday. the information is not added in the correct way the subitem and groups. is there a way to diagram the excel so that monday takes the elements as subitem or groups ?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @isrraelRios,

Currently, it isn’t possible to import tasks directly into subitems. As a workaround, you can import the data as an item, then use our “convert to subitem” feature to convert those items into subitems. Additionally, the import will import as a new group, and this is expected at this time. We apologize for the setback here, and will be sure to pass this feedback onto our team.

Thanks in advance for your understanding!

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Isrrael,

If you’re still looking for a solution on this, you can now import your data into subitems or specific groups using the Data Importer monday app.

excels monday sub items1641×875 116 KB

I’ve also made a tutorial for the step-by-step on how to do this with Excel.

Happy to answer any questions on this or take feedback requests!

James
